Audrey Hall.primary_clothing: Dress with frilly designs along the sleeves
Audrey Hall.face_description: delicate and youthful features, a soft jawline, and large expressive eyes
Audrey Hall.visual_anchor: late teens female, fair skin, long blonde hair, wearing a luxurious Victorian aristocratic dress, holding a cracked bronze mirror
Audrey Hall.distinguishing_features: Eyes become extremely bright and dauntingly vibrant when excited; now possesses the complete Spectator potion formula.
Audrey Hall.source_notes: Description of her eyes in the mirror and her transcription of the formula.

Klein Moretti.eye_color: deep dark brown, appearing pitch black like the night
Klein Moretti.primary_clothing: Black Victorian tuxedo with inner lining pockets, white shirt
Klein Moretti.face_description: average-looking features with a rather deep outline, giving off a distinct scholarly air
Klein Moretti.visual_anchor: Early 20s male, black hair, brown eyes, dressed in a sharp black tuxedo and silk top hat, carrying a plain cane.
Klein Moretti.distinguishing_features: Capable of using Spirit Vision and touching dark red stars in the gray fog.
Klein Moretti.accessories: Silver pocket watch kept in tuxedo inner lining, black cane
Klein Moretti.source_notes: He explicitly reflects on acting as a 'Seer' and mentions his use of Spirit Vision.

Alger Wilson.primary_clothing: robe with lightning patterns embroidered on it
Alger Wilson.face_description: Rough face with a well-defined structure
Alger Wilson.visual_anchor: early 30s male, weathered skin, dark messy hair, wearing a robe embroidered with lightning patterns, holding a quirky-shaped glass bottle
Alger Wilson.color_palette: deep sea blue, silver, dark grey
Alger Wilson.distinguishing_features: Hexagonal crystal-like snowflake absorbed into his palm
Alger Wilson.source_notes: The text shows him looking at a parchment titled '7. Seafarer'.

Susie.face_description: Friendly and remarkably intelligent golden retriever face, featuring a soft muzzle and expressive, bright eyes.
Susie.visual_anchor: Intelligent golden retriever dog with lustrous golden fur and bright brown eyes, often sitting with an air of capable assistance.
Susie.color_palette: golden yellow, warm brown, creamy white
Susie.distinguishing_features: Exhibits human-like obedience and intelligence; serves as Audrey's secret assistant.
Susie.source_notes: Audrey's golden retriever introduced as her 'capable assistant' who completed a mission.

The Fool.face_description: features hidden by mysterious gray fog
The Fool.visual_anchor: A mysterious male figure shrouded entirely in gray fog, acting as the initiator of the secret Gathering.
The Fool.source_notes: Mentioned as the initiator of the mysterious Gathering. Appearance and details are guessed based on context as an enigmatic leader.

Justice.face_description: elegant and refined features hidden by fog
Justice.visual_anchor: A slender young woman in an elegant Victorian dress, shrouded in gray fog during the Gathering.
Justice.distinguishing_features: Aura colors of red, purple, blue, and white; emotional aura of red and yellow indicating joy, zeal, and excitement.
Justice.source_notes: Aura and emotional colors observed by Klein using Spirit Vision.

The Hanged Man.face_description: rugged and weathered face hidden by fog
The Hanged Man.visual_anchor: A tall, rugged man in nautical Victorian attire, sitting within the mysterious gray fog.
The Hanged Man.distinguishing_features: Innermost Ether Body/Astral Projection is deep blue, akin to the sea and a tidal storm (visible to Spirit Vision).
The Hanged Man.source_notes: Aura and Astral Projection details observed by Klein using Spirit Vision.

Benson Moretti.primary_clothing: Linen shirt, black coat, halved top hat
Benson Moretti.face_description: Resembles Klein but lacks the scholarly air, looks older than his actual age due to work stress.
Benson Moretti.visual_anchor: mid-20s male, pale skin, short black hair, wearing working class Victorian attire, showing signs of fatigue
Benson Moretti.source_notes: Seen tapping a plain cane while negotiating rent.

Dunn Smith.eye_color: deep gray (appearing abnormally deep in darkness)
Dunn Smith.primary_clothing: black trench coat and a halved black top hat
Dunn Smith.face_description: Deep gaze, occasionally shows a slight hook at the corners of his lips when showing amusement
Dunn Smith.visual_anchor: late 30s male, fair skin, short dark brown hair with a high receding hairline, deep gray eyes, wearing a black top hat and a knee-length black trench coat, holding a tobacco pipe
Dunn Smith.distinguishing_features: Enjoys smoking tobacco mixed with mint leaves
Dunn Smith.source_notes: Chapter 33 describes Dunn approaching Klein with a smile ('corners of his lips hooked') and his characteristic deep gaze.

Earl Hall.primary_clothing: Dark brown Victorian waistcoat and matching trousers, dark brown hat
Earl Hall.face_description: Handsome features showing signs of age with wrinkles and a well-groomed mustache; blue eyes filled with joy.
Earl Hall.visual_anchor: Early 50s male, blue eyes, brown mustache, wearing a dark brown Victorian waistcoat and matching hat, with a slightly widening waist.
Earl Hall.source_notes: Audrey's father; blue eyes, mustache, and clothing explicitly described.

Roselle Gustav.face_description: handsome and charismatic face with an air of authority
Roselle Gustav.visual_anchor: middle-aged male, elaborate emperor attire, charismatic and authoritative presence
Roselle Gustav.color_palette: imperial red, gold, white, navy blue
Roselle Gustav.source_notes: Historical figure mentioned, visual features guessed based on his status as Emperor/Consul.
